subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सी मंगला है?
explanation_en: Jaswant Thada is a famous marble structure and a tomb located in Jodhpur, built by Maharaja Jaswant Singh II.
